blocks._fallbackText: ⚽ Barcelona v Atlético Madrid, 21:00, Copa del Rey — Favourite team Barcelona host Atlético at Camp Nou but trail 4-0 on aggregate — a historic comeback would be needed to advance
⚽ Leeds United v Sunderland, 20:30, Premier League — Classic northern English rivalry as Sunderland visit Elland Road — two clubs with fierce, vocal support making this more than a routine fixture
⚽ Wolverhampton Wanderers v Liverpool, 21:15, Premier League — Liverpool travel to Molineux in a Premier League fixture with title-race implications — Wolves a tricky away trip
⚽ AFC Bournemouth v Brentford, 20:30, Premier League — Brentford travel to Vitality Stadium for a routine Premier League clash between two mid-table sides with little on the line
⛳ Cognizant Classic in The Palm Beaches
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Athletic Club at Real Sociedad

blocks.text: 🏎️ Fri 02:30 — Qatar Airways Australian Grand Prix
